hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 95 条：AI 30 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】Bitmine 在发行优先股筹集了 2.74 亿美元后，又增加了 1.36 亿美元的以太币；【CRYPTO】尽管存在中东风险，市场仍欢呼美国与伊朗的突破，美联储仍是焦点；【CRYPTO】渣打银行表示 Uniswap 的 UNI 代币到 2030 年可能会飙升 40 倍，达到 100 美元。

items.title: Bitmine adds another $136 million of ether after raising $274 million in preferred stock sale
items.summary: Tom Lee's Ethereum treasury firm, through the preferred stock sale, is using a financing tool pioneered by Michael Saylor's bitcoin treasury firm Strategy.
items.title_zh: Bitmine 在发行优先股筹集了 2.74 亿美元后，又增加了 1.36 亿美元的以太币
items.summary_zh: Tom Lee 的以太坊财务公司通过优先股出售，正在使用 Michael Saylor 的比特币财务公司 Strategy 首创的融资工具。

items.title: Markets cheer U.S.-Iran Breakthrough though Middle East risks, Fed remain in focus
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for June 15, 2026
items.title_zh: 尽管存在中东风险，市场仍欢呼美国与伊朗的突破，美联储仍是焦点
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 6 月 15 日天气预报

items.title: Standard Chartered says Uniswap’s UNI token could surge 40x to $100 by 2030
items.summary: Standard Chartered Bank has initiated coverage of Uniswap and forecasts its UNI token could rise 40x to $100 by the end of 2030.
items.title_zh: 渣打银行表示 Uniswap 的 UNI 代币到 2030 年可能会飙升 40 倍，达到 100 美元
items.summary_zh: 渣打银行已开始覆盖 Uniswap，并预测其 UNI 代币到 2030 年底可能会上涨 40 倍，达到 100 美元。

items.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
items.summary: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.
items.title_zh: BBVA 通过 OpenAI 将人工智能置于银行业的核心
items.summary_zh: 了解 BBVA 如何将 ChatGPT Enterprise 扩展到 100,000 名员工，并与 OpenAI 合作，加速全球人工智能驱动的银行业转型。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Sign Preliminary Deal, but Its Terms Remain Secret
items.summary: President Trump and Iran’s lead negotiator have signed an agreement that was expected to open the Strait of Hormuz. But the specific terms of the deal have not been released, and Israel’s leader appears not to be fully on board.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国和伊朗签署初步协议，但其条款仍然保密
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统和伊朗首席谈判代表签署了一项协议，预计将开放霍尔木兹海峡。但该协议的具体条款尚未公布，以色列领导人似乎也没有完全同意。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bittensor (TAO) surges 31.9%, leading index higher
items.summary: Near Protocol (NEAR), up 22.2% from Friday, was also a top performer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：Bittensor (TAO) 飙升 31.9%，领先指数走高
items.summary_zh: Near Protocol (NEAR) 较上周五上涨 22.2%，也是表现最好的。

items.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy acquires another 1,587 bitcoin for $100 million
items.summary: The latest purchase was made at an average price of $63,024 per bitcoin.
items.title_zh: Michael Saylor's Strategy 以 1 亿美元收购另外 1,587 个比特币
items.summary_zh: 最新购买的平均价格为每比特币 63,024 美元。

items.title: Bitcoin Policy UK CEO calls Michael Saylor’s STRC investment promotion ‘dishonest’
items.summary: "Saylor put out a video talking about his yield with STRC...it was making it out that there is no risk involved," says Ward.
items.title_zh: 英国比特币政策首席执行官称 Michael Saylor 的 STRC 投资促销“不诚实”
items.summary_zh: “塞勒发布了一段视频，谈论他与 STRC 的收益……这表明不存在任何风险，”沃德说。

items.title: Strategy supporters rebut ‘death spiral’ fears as bitcoin price wobbles
items.summary: "The death-spiral story assumes that Strategy is one bad week from selling bitcoins, and it skips several steps to get there," said Benchmark.
items.title_zh: 随着比特币价格波动，策略支持者反驳“死亡螺旋”担忧
items.summary_zh: Benchmark 表示：“死亡螺旋的故事假设 Strategy 会在一周内出售比特币，并且跳过了几个步骤来实现这一目标。”

items.title: ‘Let’s just put it in an ETF’ is the worst outcome for bitcoin, says Trezor exec
items.summary: Trezor Chief Commercial Officer Danny Sanders said simplifying self-custody remains one of bitcoin's biggest onboarding challenges.
items.title_zh: Trezor 高管表示，“让我们把它放入 ETF 中吧”对比特币来说是最糟糕的结果
items.summary_zh: Trezor 首席商务官丹尼·桑德斯 (Danny Sanders) 表示，简化自我托管仍然是比特币面临的最大挑战之一。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
items.summary: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 合作伙伴网络简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出合作伙伴网络，投资 1.5 亿美元帮助全球合作伙伴加速企业人工智能的采用、部署和转型。

items.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
items.summary: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
items.title_zh: Preply 如何结合人工智能和真人导师来实现个性化学习
items.summary_zh: Preply 使用 OpenAI 推出人工智能生成的课程摘要，提供个性化反馈和语言学习练习。

items.title: When it comes to predicting people’s preferences, it pays to consider “the power of three”
items.summary: MIT researchers provide a major upgrade to the nearly century-old idea of random utility models.
items.title_zh: 在预测人们的偏好时，考虑“三者的力量”是值得的
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员对近百年历史的随机效用模型理念进行了重大升级。

items.title: Trump says deal to end war with Iran already signed and details to be released 'pretty soon'
items.summary: Trump says Strait of Hormuz will be open from Friday but there is still confusion about the exact contents of the agreement.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称结束与伊朗战争的协议已经签署，细节将“很快”公布
items.summary_zh: 特朗普表示霍尔木兹海峡将从周五开始开放，但协议的具体内容仍存在争议。

items.title: Bowen: Iran deal ends Trump's war that revealed limit of US dominance
items.summary: The deal to end fighting and re-open the Strait of Hormuz leaves the sides where they were 24 hours before the war - only with thousands now dead.
items.title_zh: 鲍文：伊朗协议结束了特朗普的战争，揭示了美国主导地位的局限性
items.summary_zh: 结束战斗并重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的协议使双方处于战前 24 小时的状态 - 现在只有数千人死亡。

items.title: 'Spider-Man of Yemen' dies falling into volcanic crater
items.summary: Al-Qaqa Ibn Antar had been attempting to climb its walls without safety equipment when he fell in, local authorities say.
items.title_zh: “也门蜘蛛侠”坠入火山口身亡
items.summary_zh: 地方当局称，卡卡·伊本·安塔尔 (Al-Qaqa Ibn Antar) 试图在没有安全设备的情况下爬上城墙，结果掉进了城墙。

items.title: UK Announces Social Media Ban for Children Under 16
items.summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer said his government planned to bar children under 16 from social media, following similar efforts in Australia and elsewhere.
items.title_zh: 英国宣布禁止 16 岁以下儿童使用社交媒体
items.summary_zh: 总理凯尔·斯塔默 (Keir Starmer) 表示，继澳大利亚和其他地方采取类似措施后，他的政府计划禁止 16 岁以下儿童使用社交媒体。

items.title: Inside Colombia’s Never-Ending Drug War
items.summary: Ten years after a landmark peace deal, armed groups are wreaking deadly violence, blending jungle combat with new drone warfare.
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚永无休止的毒品战争的内部
items.summary_zh: 在达成具有里程碑意义的和平协议十年后，武装团体正在制造致命的暴力，将丛林战斗与新的无人机战争融为一体。

items.title: U.K. Ban on Pro-Palestinian Protest Group Is Lawful, Court of Appeal Rules
items.summary: The decision overturned a lower-court ruling that had found that banning Palestine Action as a terrorist group had breached free speech rights.
items.title_zh: 上诉法院裁定英国对亲巴勒斯坦抗议团体的禁令是合法的
items.summary_zh: 该决定推翻了下级法院的一项裁决，该裁决认为将巴勒斯坦行动列为恐怖组织侵犯了言论自由权。

items.title: If America wants to lead in crypto, it must protect the people who build it
items.summary: Despite the Clarity Act’s advancement toward the finish line, there’s one provision under threat for builders that can’t be overlooked, argues Smith.
items.title_zh: 如果美国想在加密领域处于领先地位，就必须保护其构建者
items.summary_zh: 史密斯认为，尽管《清晰法案》已接近终点线，但对于建筑商来说，有一项条款不容忽视。

items.title: Kraken debuts U.S. perpetual futures as crypto derivatives move onshore
items.summary: Perpetual futures generated more than $60 trillion in volume last year, according to the crypto exchange, largely outside the U.S.
items.title_zh: 随着加密货币衍生品登陆美国，Kraken 首次推出美国永续期货
items.summary_zh: 根据该加密货币交易所的数据，去年永续期货的交易量超过 60 万亿美元，其中大部分是在美国以外的地区。

items.title: XRP rockets 8% above $1.20 in first major breakout since June selloff
items.summary: Heavy volume pushed XRP through multiple resistance levels, with traders now focused on whether the rally can extend toward $1.30 after weeks of defensive positioning.
items.title_zh: XRP 飙升 8%，突破 1.20 美元，这是自 6 月抛售以来的首次重大突破
items.summary_zh: 大量成交量推动 XRP 突破多个阻力位，交易员现在关注的是，经过数周的防御性定位后，涨势能否延续至 1.30 美元。

items.title: Spot HYPE ETFs near $900 million in volume as early demand signals institutional interest
items.summary: Volume across the three products has been uneven, with BHYP and THYP accounting for the bulk of activity while HYPG continues to ramp.
items.title_zh: 早期需求表明机构兴趣，现货 HYPE ETF 交易量接近 9 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 这三种产品的成交量并不均衡，BHYP 和 THYP 占据了大部分活动，而 HYPG 则继续增加。

items.title: SpaceX IPO fuels $1.4 billion trading frenzy on Hyperliquid as SPCX perp becomes HIP-3’s biggest market
items.summary: Stock-linked HIP-3 markets have generated more than $18.8 billion in volume so far this month, eclipsing crude oil and Brent perps combined.
items.title_zh: 随着 SPCX perp 成为 HIP-3 最大市场，SpaceX IPO 助长 Hyperliquid 价值 14 亿美元的交易狂潮
items.summary_zh: 本月迄今为止，与股票挂钩的 HIP-3 市场成交量已超过 188 亿美元，超过了原油和布伦特原油的总成交量。

items.title: ‘There’s room for win-win outcomes’: Largest Solana treasury firm Forward looks to acquire smaller SOL DATs
items.summary: Forward Industries is offering to acquire Solana DAT competitors at a premium as their mNAVs slip along with the declining price of SOL.
items.title_zh: “存在双赢的空间”：最大的 Solana 财务公司 Forward 寻求收购规模较小的 SOL DAT
items.summary_zh: Forward Industries 提出以溢价收购 Solana DAT 竞争对手，因为他们的 mNAV 随着 SOL 价格的下降而下滑。

items.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
items.title_zh: 支持欧洲确保值得信赖的人工智能生态系统的工作
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 支持欧盟关于人工智能内容透明度的实践准则，推进来源标准和工具以帮助人们理解人工智能生成的内容。

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: 赵金华出任城市研究与规划系主任
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: The consequences of relying on AI for accurate news
items.summary: A Media Lab study shows that, much like how GPS has weakened our navigation skills, AI can make us worse at detecting fake news.
items.title_zh: 依靠人工智能获取准确新闻的后果
items.summary_zh: 媒体实验室的一项研究表明，就像 GPS 削弱了我们的导航技能一样，人工智能也会让我们更不擅长检测假新闻。

items.title: Teaching AI agents to ask better questions by playing “Battleship”
items.summary: MIT researchers use the classic game as a test bed for AI agents, finding a small AI model can outperform the biggest ones at 1 percent of the cost.
items.title_zh: 通过玩“战舰”来教人工智能代理提出更好的问题
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员使用这款经典游戏作为 AI 代理的测试平台，发现小型 AI 模型可以以 1% 的成本超越最大的模型。

items.title: ‘Crypto spring’ is here, says one analyst after bitcoin's key signals turn bullish
items.summary: Standard Chartered analyst Geoffrey Kendrick's bullish call comes as spot bitcoin exchange-traded fund inflows return, oil prices fall and Coinbase's CEO says bitcoin likely bottomed near $60,000.
items.title_zh: 一位分析师在比特币关键信号转为看涨后表示，“加密货币的春天”已经到来
items.summary_zh: 渣打银行 (Standard Chartered) 分析师杰弗里·肯德里克 (Geoffrey Kendrick) 发出看涨预测，正值现货比特币交易所交易基金资金流入回归、油价下跌以及 Coinbase 首席执行官表示比特币可能触底接近 60,000 美元之际。

items.title: Coinbase's Brian Armstrong says bitcoin may have bottomed at $60,000
items.summary: Armstrong said his instinct is that bitcoin has probably found its floor, pointing to the four-year cycle that has historically marked lows.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 的 Brian Armstrong 表示比特币可能已触底 60,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 阿姆斯特朗表示，他的直觉是比特币可能已经找到了底部，并指出四年周期已创下历史新低。

items.title: IREN enters Europe with acquisition of Spanish AI data center developer Nostrum
items.summary: IREN now has AI infrastructure projects in the works across multiple continents as it expands beyond bitcoin mining.
items.title_zh: IREN 收购西班牙人工智能数据中心开发商 Nostrum 进军欧洲
items.summary_zh: IREN 目前正在多个大洲开展人工智能基础设施项目，并将业务扩展到比特币挖矿之外。

items.title: Kraken launches crypto perps trading in the US on Kraken Pro
items.summary: Kraken completed its acquisition of the fully CFTC-licensed exchange, clearinghouse, and brokerage Bitnomial in May.
items.title_zh: Kraken 在美国的 Kraken Pro 上推出加密货币永续交易
items.summary_zh: Kraken 于 5 月完成了对 CFTC 完全许可的交易所、清算所和经纪公司 Bitnomial 的收购。

items.title: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
items.summary: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.
items.title_zh: 通过 Oracle 云承诺访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex
items.summary_zh: 通过 Oracle Cloud 访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex，利用现有承诺构建和部署具有企业安全性和治理的 AI。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Startup’s nuclear-inspired cooling system could make data centers more sustainable
items.summary: Founded by two researchers from MIT, Ferveret reduces the amount of energy and water required to cool the chips that power AI.
items.title_zh: 初创公司的核冷却系统可以使数据中心更具可持续性
items.summary_zh: Ferveret 由麻省理工学院的两名研究人员创立，可减少冷却人工智能芯片所需的能源和水量。

items.title: The crucial human component in computing and AI
items.summary: The MIT Ethics of Computing Research Symposium brought together experts and researchers working at the heart of ethical and social impact in technology.
items.title_zh: 计算和人工智能中至关重要的人类组成部分
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机伦理研究研讨会汇集了从事技术伦理和社会影响核心工作的专家和研究人员。

items.title: NSF renews support for MIT-led AI and physics institute, expanding a new model for discovery
items.summary: IAIFI enters its second phase with increased funding, broader ambitions, and a growing community at the frontier of AI and fundamental physics.
items.title_zh: NSF 继续支持麻省理工学院领导的人工智能和物理研究所，拓展新的发现模式
items.summary_zh: IAIFI 进入第二阶段，资金增加、雄心勃勃，人工智能和基础物理学前沿社区不断壮大。

items.title: CFTC chair Selig defends decision to approve ‘perps’ in U.S.
items.summary: Michael Selig said that incumbents will always fear the future, but it's important to develop the new asset class domestically rather than only offshore.
items.title_zh: CFTC 主席 Selig 为美国批准“perps”的决定进行辩护
items.summary_zh: 迈克尔·塞利格(Michael Selig)表示，现有企业总是担心未来，但重要的是在国内而不是仅在海外开发新的资产类别。

items.title: SpaceX IPO leaves retail investors with too few shares and a tough hold-or-sell decision
items.summary: Those who did receive stock are taking different approaches, with some selling into the company's market debut while others holding for the long haul.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 首次公开募股让散户投资者持有的股票太少，并且面临持有或出售的艰难决定
items.summary_zh: 那些确实收到股票的人正在采取不同的方法，一些人在公司首次上市时出售，而另一些人则长期持有。

items.title: SpaceX doesn't have a timeline for its human missions to Mars. Kalshi traders say don't expect it this decade
items.summary: Traders on prediction market platform Kalshi see only an 18% chance the Elon Musk-led company gets to Earth's neighbor by 2030.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 没有载人火星任务的时间表。卡尔希贸易商称这十年不会出现这种情况
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台 Kalshi 上的交易员认为，埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 领导的公司到 2030 年到达地球邻居的可能性只有 18%。

items.title: Ron Baron bought $1 billion of SpaceX shares in IPO, lifting stake to $25 billion
items.summary: "I think we're gonna make hundreds of billions of dollars," Baron said Monday on CNBC's "Squawk Box."
items.title_zh: Ron Baron 在 IPO 中购买了 10 亿美元的 SpaceX 股票，将持股比例提升至 250 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 巴伦周一在 CNBC 的“Squawk Box”节目中表示：“我认为我们将赚取数千亿美元。”

items.title: Charlie Javice reportedly seeking a pardon from Trump
items.summary: Javice founded a startup called Frank that JPMorgan acquired in 2021 for $175 million.
items.title_zh: 据报道查理·贾维斯寻求特朗普的赦免
items.summary_zh: Javice 创立了一家名为 Frank 的初创公司，摩根大通于 2021 年以 1.75 亿美元收购了该公司。

items.title: Why TD Securities anticipates even bigger days ahead for SpaceX
items.summary: Peter Haynes, TD Securities' head of index and market structure, suggests SpaceX's public debut is only a small part of the larger SpaceX timeline.
items.title_zh: 为什么道明证券预计 SpaceX 未来会更辉煌
items.summary_zh: 道明证券 (TD Securities) 指数和市场结构主管彼得·海恩斯 (Peter Haynes) 表示，SpaceX 的公开亮相只是 SpaceX 更大时间表的一小部分。

items.title: The S&P 500 already made a big call on SpaceX stock and index fund investors need to know it
items.summary: The S&P 500 index, where trillions in retirement savings are invested, said no to the SpaceX IPO, the biggest in history. Here's what that means for portfolios.
items.title_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数已经对 SpaceX 股票进行了重大看涨，指数基金投资者需要知道这一点
items.summary_zh: 投资了数万亿退休储蓄的标准普尔 500 指数对 SpaceX 的 IPO 表示拒绝，这是历史上规模最大的 IPO。这对于投资组合意味着什么。

items.title: SpaceX raising $75 billion in record-setting IPO as Nasdaq debut awaits
items.summary: SpaceX is selling 555.6 shares at $135 a piece, raising $75 billion in the largest IPO on record.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 在纳斯达克首次公开募股中筹集了 750 亿美元创纪录的资金
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 以每股 135 美元的价格出售 555.6 股股票，筹集了 750 亿美元的资金，这是有记录以来最大规模的 IPO。

items.title: SpaceX cuts retail IPO allocation to low 20% range, source says
items.summary: The Elon Musk-led company plans to direct a percentage in the low 20s of the offering to retail buyers, according to a person familiar with the matter.
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，SpaceX 将零售 IPO 分配削减至 20%
items.summary_zh: 据一位知情人士透露，这家由埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 领导的公司计划将 20% 左右的产品直接面向零售买家。

items.title: SpaceX to close above $2 trillion market cap on its debut, prediction market traders say
items.summary: Traders on Polymarket think it's likely SpaceX will join a group of just six companies with a market value beyond $2 trillion.
items.title_zh: 预测市场交易员表示，SpaceX 首次亮相时的收盘价将突破 2 万亿美元
items.summary_zh: Polymarket 的交易员认为 SpaceX 很可能会加入由六家公司组成、市值超过 2 万亿美元的行列。

items.title: Norwegian crown princess's son found guilty of two counts of rape
items.summary: Marius Borg Høiby, the 29-year-old son of Norway's Crown Princess Mette Marit, has been sentenced to four years in jail.
items.title_zh: 挪威王储妃之子被判两项强奸罪
items.summary_zh: 挪威王储妃梅特·马里特 (Mette Marit) 29 岁的儿子马吕斯·博格·霍伊比 (Marius Borg Høiby) 被判处四年监禁。

items.title: Brazil woman dies after rope-jumping instructors fail to attach cord
items.summary: Three men have been arrested after instructors failed to attach a rope to her before helping her jump from a bridge.

items.summary_zh: 教练在帮助她从桥上跳下来之前未能给她系上绳子，导致三名男子被捕。

items.title: South African jazz legend Abdullah Ibrahim dies at 91
items.summary: Ibrahim helped define a genre of South African jazz music in a career that spanned eight decades.
items.title_zh: 南非爵士传奇人物阿卜杜拉·易卜拉欣去世，享年 91 岁
items.summary_zh: 易卜拉欣在长达八年的职业生涯中帮助定义了南非爵士音乐的流派。

items.title: MSF staff abused Sudanese refugees in sex-for-food scandal
items.summary: Some victims said they chose not to speak out because they feared staff would cut off access to aid.

items.summary_zh: 一些受害者表示，他们选择不发声，因为他们担心工作人员会切断援助渠道。

items.title: Russian strikes kill 11 and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
items.summary: A Ukrainian drone attack in the Russian city of Tula, south of Moscow, killed three people.

items.summary_zh: 乌克兰无人机袭击了莫斯科以南的俄罗斯城市图拉，造成三人死亡。

items.title: After Russia Attacks Kyiv With Missiles and Drones, Historic Orthodox Cathedral Burns

items.summary_zh: 尽管乌克兰加入欧盟的谈判已经开始，但前方的道路仍然漫长。

items.title: Jaded and Exhausted, Many Iranians Shrug at World Cup
items.summary: The successes of Iran’s national soccer team used to be a source of celebration. Now, many Iranians can barely muster the energy to care.

items.summary_zh: 伊朗国家足球队的成功曾经是值得庆祝的事情。现在，许多伊朗人几乎没有精力去护理。

items.title: Two Men Found Guilty in Arson Attacks Targeting U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer
items.summary: The men were convicted of conspiring to set fire to properties and a car linked to the prime minister after one of them was recruited on a Russian-language Telegram account.

items.title: How Quebec Left the Church and Became the World Leader in Assisted Dying
